commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Discord preflight helper that drops bot-authored operational telemetry-shaped messages and adds focused preflight tests for dropped telemetry and kept conversational bot text.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +64. Total +101 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: set a positive `messages.inbound.debounceMs`, allow bot messages, then send the same bot a telemetry line followed by conversational text within the debounce window. The handler coalesces them into one synthetic message, and the new preflight gate drops it because the joined text starts with telemetry.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the blocking Discord debounce regression in the handler and focused tests.

target.title: fix(discord): drop bot operational telemetry before dispatch
target.body:
## Summary

- drop standalone bot-authored Discord operational telemetry before preflight/model dispatch
- cover Hermes-style tool/status telemetry prefixes (`skill_view`, `session_search`, `read_file`, `terminal`, `todo`, compression/working/interrupt/self-review messages, and `toolResult`/`tool calls` summaries)
- keep conversational bot messages that merely mention operational terms

## Why

In bot-collaboration channels, runtime/tool telemetry can be visible in Discord while not being conversational input. When `allowBots` is enabled for a collaboration lane, those standalone status messages can otherwise proceed to trajectory/model dispatch and become `NO_REPLY` churn.

## Real behavior proof

This fix was first validated against the live owner-operated OpenClaw/Discord setup before upstreaming it from source.

Live setup evidence:

```text
OpenClaw 2026.6.8 (844f405)
launchctl gateway state = running
launchctl gateway pid = 93766
```

Live Discord telemetry proof from the same setup:

```text
Sent Hermes-authored telemetry-shaped Discord message:
📖 read_file: "/Users/rj/OpenClaw/state/agent-collaboration/active-candidates-current.md"

Expected behavior:
standalone Hermes operational telemetry should be ignored before Claw/model dispatch.

Observed behavior:
after the wait window, the latest discord-collab session/trajectory files did not get newer mtimes, so the message did not create a new Claw model trajectory run.
```

The currently installed runtime has the same behavior as a hot patch; this PR moves that live-proven behavior into source with regression coverage so future installs do not depend on patched dist files.

## Verification

```text
pnpm vitest run extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.preflight.test.ts
→ 52 passed

pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.preflight.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.preflight.test.ts
→ All matched files use the correct format.

pnpm exec oxlint extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.preflight.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.preflight.test.ts
→ passed

pnpm tsgo:test:extensions
→ passed

git diff --check -- extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.preflight.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.preflight.test.ts
→ passed
```
target.author: solders-girdles
